title: Real Filing Reborn
description: Real Filing Reborn is a modern storage solution for Minecraft, built on NeoForge. Inspired by the classic Real Filing Cabinet by BlueNeenja.
body:
![logo.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/deonjonker123/RealFilingReborn/refs/heads/26.1.2/logo.png)

Real Filing Reborn is a storage mod built around **Filing Folders** — items that each hold a massive quantity of a single item type — and **Filing Cabinets** to house them.

---

## Features

### Filing Cabinet
Filing cabinets come in three types:
- **Single Cabinet** - Holds 1 folder
- **Double Cabinet** - Holds 2 folders
- **Quad Cabinet** - Holds 4 folders
- Fully compatible with automation (hoppers, pipes, etc.)
- **Right-click** to insert items directly into a matching folder
- **Right-click** with a folder to insert it into an empty slot
- **Shift + Right-click** to open the cabinet GUI

### Filing Index

- Links multiple cabinets into a **unified storage network**
- Base range of **8 blocks**, extendable up to **64 blocks** with upgrades
- **Right-click** with an item to insert it into a matching folder across the network
- Compatible with external storage interfaces (AE2, Refined Storage, etc.) for unified access
- Pipes and hoppers connected to the index route items into matching folders automatically
- **Shift + Right-click** to open the index GUI

### Ledger Tool

- Links and unlinks cabinets to a Filing Index
- **Single and multi-selection modes** for individual cabinets or entire areas
- Visual wireframes show network topology, range, and connections in real-time

---

## Filing Folders

Folders come in six tiers and store a **single item type** each.

| Tier | Capacity |
|------|----------|
| Base | 4,096 |
| Copper | 32,768 |
| Iron | 262,144 |
| Gold | 2,097,152 |
| Diamond | 16,777,216 |
| Netherite | 134,217,728 |

- Cannot store items with NBT data (enchantments, custom names, damage, etc.)
- **Shift + Right-click** a folder to open its GUI for assigning, depositing, and extracting items
- Upgrade a folder by placing it in the top-left of a 2x2 crafting grid with three of the next tier's material — stored contents are preserved
- Reset an assigned but empty folder to factory default by placing it alone in a crafting grid

## Range Upgrades

| Upgrade | Range |
|---------|-------|
| Iron | 16 blocks |
| Diamond | 32 blocks |
| Netherite | 64 blocks |

---

## Compatibility

- Applied Energistics 2
- Refined Storage
- Tom's Simple Storage
- Integrated Dynamics
